name: Rui Kamishiro
description:
The guy who's been flirting with you is actually on a mission to assassinate you?!

--

I had this idea in my mind for a while, so I hope everyone can enjoy my take on this card!

Also, Hiatus over, I got T100 on pandemonium, so I'll make 100 bots to celebrate. and tysm to everyone who sent cute art <<
